assessor_raw: Evaluating TFT vs LightGBM SKU-FC demand forecasting. The design proactively addresses the most common TFT-vs-tabular confounds: future covariate access is equalized, tuning budgets are matched, censored demand labels are equalized via Tobit preprocessing, and temporal structure is preserved. The naive seasonal baseline provides an appropriate sanity floor. Verdict: defense_wins.
